AUDIT EVIDENCE Immutable governance event log Governance Atlas records backed metadata workflow events in a searchable Delta audit log. Export and retention controls stay unavailable until the runtime reports those capabilities. Date range Generate report Export CSV EVENTS · 24H 0 governance audit log POLICY VIOLATIONS 0 governance audit log ACCESS REVIEWS · OPEN 0 governance audit log RETENTION Unavailable Retention policy not reported All events By users By services Violations Time (UTC) Actor Event Target Evidence No audit events match the current filters. Append-only Delta audit log governance-store+metadata-audit-log · time-travel evidence references only, no raw row values.
